on_screen_text:
अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App 😍 [Download Zinglish App to become the richest person in your family 😍]
Bank of India: + ₹ 2,01,108 Credited to Account 0002
Credit Alert! Rs. 50,000.00 credited to DBFC Bank
Zinglish: English Speaking App
summary: The ad uses a get-rich-quick hook, showing a lucky spin wheel and fake bank credit notifications of large sums of money. It then directs the user to download the Zinglish English Speaking App from the Google Play Store to become the richest person in their family.
